features.name: Install @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency
features.spec: Add @modelcontextprotocol/sdk to backend package.json and install
features.test: Package is in node_modules and importable

features.name: MCP server HTTP client module
features.spec: Create HTTP client that authenticates with TaskClaw API (JWT login, token caching, auto-refresh)
features.test: Client can login and make authenticated GET /accounts request

features.name: MCP board tools
features.spec: Implement list_boards, get_board, create_board, update_board, delete_board, import_board, export_board MCP tools
features.test: All 7 board tools callable via MCP protocol and return correct data

features.name: MCP board step tools
features.spec: Implement list_board_steps, create_board_step, update_board_step, reorder_steps MCP tools
features.test: All 4 board step tools callable via MCP protocol

features.name: MCP task tools
features.spec: Implement list_tasks, get_task, create_task, update_task, move_task, complete_task, delete_task, bulk_create_tasks MCP tools
features.test: All 8 task tools callable via MCP protocol

features.name: MCP conversation tools
features.spec: Implement list_conversations, create_conversation, send_message MCP tools
features.test: All 3 conversation tools callable via MCP protocol

features.name: MCP skill & knowledge tools
features.spec: Implement list_skills, list_categories, list_knowledge_docs MCP tools
features.test: All 3 skill/knowledge tools callable via MCP protocol

features.name: MCP integration tools
features.spec: Implement list_integrations, trigger_sync MCP tools
features.test: Both integration tools callable via MCP protocol

features.name: MCP account tools
features.spec: Implement get_account, list_members MCP tools
features.test: Both account tools callable via MCP protocol

features.name: MCP entry point and server bootstrap
features.spec: Create backend/mcp-entry.ts standalone entry point that bootstraps MCP server with stdio transport, registers all tools
features.test: Running 'node backend/dist/mcp-entry.js' starts MCP server, Claude Code can connect via mcp.json config

features.name: API keys database migration
features.spec: Create api_keys table with id, account_id, user_id, key_hash, key_prefix, name, scopes, last_used_at, expires_at, created_at
features.test: Migration runs successfully, table exists in database

features.name: API key entity and service
features.spec: Create ApiKey entity, ApiKeysService with create (generates tc_live_ prefixed key, stores SHA-256 hash), list (masked), delete/revoke, validate methods
features.test: Service can create key, validate it, list keys masked, and revoke key

features.name: API key guard and auth integration
features.spec: Modify AuthGuard to accept both JWT Bearer tokens and API keys (X-API-Key header or Bearer tc_live_ prefix). Update last_used_at on each use.
features.test: curl with X-API-Key header returns authenticated response, JWT still works

features.name: API keys controller endpoints
features.spec: Create GET /accounts/:id/api-keys (list), POST /accounts/:id/api-keys (create, returns full key once), DELETE /accounts/:id/api-keys/:keyId (revoke)
features.test: All 3 endpoints work correctly via curl

features.name: API keys frontend settings page
features.spec: Create settings page at /dashboard/settings/api-keys with key list, create form (name, scopes checkboxes, expiry), copy-key-once dialog, revoke button
features.test: Can create, view, copy, and revoke API keys from the UI

features.name: API keys server actions
features.spec: Create frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/api-keys/actions.ts with getApiKeys, createApiKey, deleteApiKey server actions
features.test: Server actions correctly proxy to backend API

features.name: Update MCP server to support API key auth
features.spec: MCP server HTTP client supports TASKCLAW_API_KEY env var as alternative to email/password. API key takes priority when both provided.
features.test: MCP server works with TASKCLAW_API_KEY=tc_live_xxx env var

features.name: Install @nestjs/swagger dependency
features.spec: Add @nestjs/swagger and swagger-ui-express to backend package.json
features.test: Packages installed and importable

features.name: Swagger module setup in main.ts
features.spec: Configure SwaggerModule in backend/src/main.ts with title, description, version, bearer auth. Serve at /api/docs (UI) and /api/docs-json (spec)
features.test: GET /api/docs returns Swagger UI page, GET /api/docs-json returns valid OpenAPI 3.0 JSON

features.name: Swagger decorators on auth controllers
features.spec: Add @ApiTags, @ApiOperation, @ApiResponse decorators to auth controller and DTOs
features.test: Auth endpoints visible in Swagger UI with correct schemas

features.name: Swagger decorators on board controllers
features.spec: Add swagger decorators to boards controller, board-steps controller, and board-templates controller
features.test: Board endpoints visible in Swagger UI

features.name: Swagger decorators on task controller
features.spec: Add swagger decorators to tasks controller and DTOs
features.test: Task endpoints visible in Swagger UI

features.name: Swagger decorators on remaining controllers
features.spec: Add swagger decorators to conversations, skills, knowledge, categories, integrations, sources, sync, accounts, users, api-keys, ai-provider, teams, admin controllers
features.test: All endpoints visible in Swagger UI with correct schemas

features.name: Webhooks database migration
features.spec: Create webhooks table (id, account_id, url, secret, events[], active, created_at) and webhook_deliveries table (id, webhook_id, event, payload, status, response_code, attempts, next_retry_at, created_at)
features.test: Migration runs, both tables exist

features.name: Webhooks service and emitter
features.spec: Create WebhooksService (CRUD on webhooks, delivery listing) and WebhookEmitterService (emit event, find matching webhooks, deliver with HMAC-SHA256, retry with exponential backoff)
features.test: Service can create webhook, emit event, deliver payload with correct HMAC signature

features.name: Webhooks controller endpoints
features.spec: Create GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /accounts/:id/webhooks and GET /accounts/:id/webhooks/:whId/deliveries
features.test: All 5 endpoints work correctly via curl

features.name: Webhook events in task service
features.spec: Inject WebhookEmitterService into TasksService, emit task.created, task.updated, task.completed, task.deleted events
features.test: Creating/updating/completing/deleting a task triggers webhook delivery

features.name: Webhook events in board service
features.spec: Inject WebhookEmitterService into BoardsService, emit board.created, board.updated, board.deleted events
features.test: Creating/updating/deleting a board triggers webhook delivery

features.name: Webhook events in conversation service
features.spec: Inject WebhookEmitterService into ConversationsService, emit conversation.created, message.created events
features.test: Creating conversation or sending message triggers webhook delivery

features.name: Webhooks frontend settings page
features.spec: Create settings page at /dashboard/settings/webhooks with webhook list, create/edit form (URL, secret, event checkboxes, active toggle), delivery history view
features.test: Can create, view, edit, delete webhooks and view delivery history from UI

features.name: Webhooks server actions
features.spec: Create frontend/src/app/dashboard/settings/webhooks/actions.ts with getWebhooks, createWebhook, updateWebhook, deleteWebhook, getDeliveries server actions
features.test: Server actions correctly proxy to backend API

features.name: Remove team member endpoint
features.spec: Add DELETE /accounts/:id/members/:memberId to accounts controller
features.test: curl DELETE removes member and they lose access

features.name: Accept invitation endpoint
features.spec: Add POST /accounts/:id/invitations/:invId/accept to accounts controller
features.test: curl POST accepts invitation and adds user to account

features.name: User preferences endpoint
features.spec: Add PATCH /users/me/preferences for theme mode, locale, notification settings. Store in user_preferences table or users table JSONB column.
features.test: curl PATCH updates preferences, GET /users/me returns preferences

features.name: Task full-text search endpoint
features.spec: Add GET /accounts/:id/tasks/search?q= with full-text search on title and notes
features.test: curl GET with q parameter returns matching tasks

features.name: Bulk task update endpoint
features.spec: Add PATCH /accounts/:id/tasks/bulk accepting array of {id, ...updates} for batch status/step/priority changes
features.test: curl PATCH with array of task updates applies all changes

features.name: MCP server documentation
features.spec: Create docs/mcp-server.md with installation, configuration, all 27 tools reference, auth methods, troubleshooting, architecture diagram
features.test: Document exists with complete tool reference and working examples

features.name: API key and webhook documentation
features.spec: Update docs/documentation/authentication-authorization.md with API key section. Create docs/documentation/webhooks.md with events, payloads, HMAC verification, retry behavior
features.test: Both docs exist with accurate, complete information

features.name: Architecture and README documentation updates
features.spec: Update docs/architecture.md with MCP server, webhook system. Update README.md with MCP and OpenAPI sections. Update docs/development.md with /api/docs access.
features.test: All updated docs reference new features correctly

features.name: Update CLAUDE.md and settings nav
features.spec: Update CLAUDE.md with MCP server section, API key auth, new module paths. Update frontend settings navigation to include API Keys and Webhooks sections.
features.test: CLAUDE.md reflects all new modules, settings nav shows API Keys and Webhooks
